Appearances:
Plaintiff Rosemary Court Properties LLC is present. Represented by Tom McCormick.
Attorney Cindy Lee appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Michael Murray is present.
Attorney Gregory C. Ellis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of APR-30-2012 is vacated.
